items.name: Kastra
items.description: Runtime authorization for Claude, Cursor, Codex and OpenClaw. Kastra is the runtime authorization layer for AI agents. It decides what agents can and cannot do before actions execute, enforcing policies with sub-1 ms latency across tools, prompts, inputs, and outputs. Use one control plane to govern agents and policies across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, the Anthropic SDK, the OpenAI SDK, and more. Prevent unauthorized tool use, prompt injection, and exposure of sensitive data before they become incidents. Trust the rules, not the agents.

raw_data.tagline: Runtime authorization for Claude, Cursor, Codex and OpenClaw

items.name: box

At $0.036/hr it is 10x less expensive than the likes of E2B, Daytona, Modal, so you can run more agents, or run them longer. Run up to 1000 concurrent boxes fully self-served, or ask us for more, with same-day support from the founders.

items.name: MemX
items.description: Your infinite memory. Millions save data in photos, notes, texts, recordings — across a dozen apps. Then scroll forever to find it again. MemX puts it all under one roof. Upload a warranty. Record a meeting. Snap a doctor's note. Save a thought. MemX connects the dots, makes it searchable and reminds you. You just ask. "Where's my car insurance policy?" items.name: AI Content Visibility Grader
items.description: See how an AI Agent sees your Website. The AI Content Visibility Grader reveals the gap between what your readers see and what an AI agent actually reads when it cites your page. Paste any URL: it fetches the raw HTML an AI agent reads for citation, renders the full page a human sees, and highlights what falls through the gap. It simulates a ChatGPT-User fetch, checks your JSON-LD and structured data, and lets you export a shareable report, so you can make your content visible to AI, not just people.

items.name: BotCritic
items.description: Stress-test your AI chatbot before your customers do. Most chatbot testing tools check if your bot follows a script. BotCritic tests whether it survives a real customer — frustrated, confused, multilingual, or trying to break it. What makes it different: full conversation transcripts as evidence, a rewritten system prompt targeting the exact failures found, and the ability to re-test after fixes to prove they worked. We hold our own product to the same standard — we ran BotCritic on its own pitch and published the result, hallucination included.

raw_data.tagline: Stress-test your AI chatbot before your customers do

items.name: Zoviz Canvas
items.description: Build AI image and video pipelines on one canvas. Canvas is Zoviz's node workspace where many AI models run in one pipeline. Generate an image, edit it by prompt, animate it, then cut it into a longer sequence using Prompt, Image Generation, Image Edit, and Video nodes. Each step feeds the next, so you build real projects: product clips, animation, short films, and ads. Newest models like Seedance 2.0 are built in, plus ready made templates to clone a full pipeline in one click. Free to start, built for teams, part of the Zoviz branding suite.

raw_data.tagline: Build AI image and video pipelines on one canvas

items.name: Still Your Words
items.description: AI proofreader - fixes dictation without erasing your voice. Speech-to-text is great until you read what it wrote: wrong words, garbled phrases, repeated sentences. Most AI cleanup tools "fix" this by rewriting everything into polished corporate English — which no longer sounds like you. Still Your Words cleans up messy dictation while keeping your own words. Two modes: Balanced and Polished. Every correction is a clickable mark — skim the changes and click any one to keep your original wording.

raw_data.tagline: AI proofreader - fixes dictation without erasing your voice
